description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 1 hr 58 mins coding, with a daily average of 48 mins. His activity was split across 2 projects, and his most-used languages were Markdown, Python, and Other. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, including #106 through #117.
